title: Section 3
content: 1[3. Establishment of Highway Administrations.]--(1) The Central Government shall, by notification in the Official Gazette,-- (a) establish, for the purposes of this Act, a body or authority consisting of one or more officers of the Central Government or the State Government to be known as Highway Administration to exercise powers and discharge functions conferred on it under this Act; and (b) define the limits of the Highway within which, or the length of Highway on which, a Highway Administration shall have jurisdiction: Provided that the Central Government may, in the notification issued under this sub-section or by any general or special order, impose any condition or limitation subject to which a Highway Administration shall exercise powers and discharge functions conferred on it under this Act. (2) The Central Government may establish one or more Highway Administrations for a State or Union territory or for a Highway under sub-section (1). (3) Subject to the provisions of this Act, the Highway Administration shall exercise powers and discharge functions conferred on it under this Act in such manner as may be prescribed.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 167, ibid., for the Heading (w.e.f. 26-5-2017).
